achievements.title: First Light

achievements.title: First Backtest

achievements.title: Sharper Than Most
achievements.description: Ran a backtest with Sharpe ratio above 5.

achievements.title: Sharpe 20
achievements.description: Ran a backtest with Sharpe ratio above 20.
